source.title: BSEE Accident Investigation Report - Structural Damage to Gas Lift Piping

event.top_event: Structural damage to high pressure gas lift piping during mezzanine deck installation
actions_taken: Shut in affected gas lift wells (#2, #5, #6)
Bled pressure to zero in 4" high pressure gas piping
Jammed leg of mezzanine deck cut off
Deck moved closer to designated position
Work shut down for the day
event.summary: On 6 March 2015 at 1615 hrs, during installation of the West Gas Lift Mezzanine Deck (6,500 pounds) on Murphy's MC 736 A Platform, the load shifted and jammed between high pressure (1300 psi) gas lift piping and a 4" isolation valve. The incident resulted from failure to follow engineering design specifications for lifting equipment placement, non-use of hold back hoist and tag lines, and non-installation of stabbing guides. Attempts to unjam the load caused the gas lift piping to bow and create a 5/16" gouge in the isolation valve body. No injuries or hydrocarbon releases occurred. Property damage exceeded $50,000.
recommendations: Document lifting operations over high pressure piping as critical lifts
Ensure specified locations for chain hoist and sling placement are followed per engineering designs
Use hold back chain hoist as planned to control load
Use tag lines as required to direct and control load
Pre-install and use stabbing guides for lift deck legs
Enforce stop work authority when incidents develop
Isolate and bleed down high pressure piping prior to lifting operations over pressurized lines
Conduct adequate hazard identification for lifts over high pressure equipment

hazards.name: Heavy suspended load (6,500 lb mezzanine deck)

threats.name: Load jam against high pressure piping
Deviation from planned lift path and elevation
Continued unjamming attempts with pressurized piping

consequences.name: Structural damage to gas lift piping
Potential loss of containment from pressurized piping

controls.name: Engineering design specifications for lifting equipment placement
controls.barrier_role: Prevent load deviation from planned lift path
controls.lod_basis: Primary control to ensure safe load positioning

supporting_text: the specific placement of the lifting equipment was not followed as required by engineering designs
this resulted in the hoisting and traveling of the load to veer from the planned lift path and elevation

controls.name: Hold back hoist for load control
controls.barrier_role: Prevent uncontrolled load movement and deviation

supporting_text: the crew did not utilize a hold back hoist and tag lines as planned to assist in direction and controlling the load
A hold back chain hoist was not used as planned to assist in controlling the load

controls.name: Tag lines for load direction and control
controls.barrier_role: Assist in directing and controlling load movement
controls.lod_basis: Manual control measure for load positioning

supporting_text: the crew did not utilize a hold back hoist and tag lines as planned to assist in direction and controlling the load
Tag lines on the lift were not used as required to help direct and control the load

controls.name: Pre-fabricated stabbing guides for lift deck legs
controls.barrier_role: Guide and stabilize load during positioning
controls.lod_basis: Mechanical guide to prevent load misalignment

supporting_text: the pre-fabricated stabbing guides for the lift deck legs were not used as planned
Stabbing guides for the gas lift deck legs were not pre-installed and not used

controls.name: Critical lift documentation and hazard assessment
controls.barrier_role: Identify and document hazards of lifting over high pressure piping
controls.lod_basis: Management control to ensure hazard awareness

supporting_text: the lifting and positioning of the Gas Lift Mezzanine over high pressure piping using temporary hoisting and rolling scaffolding was not documented as a critical lift with the potential to be a major event
3rd Party Risk Assessment Analysis performed prior to the mezzanine decks installation did not adequately identify the hazards of making the lift over high pressure gas piping

controls.name: Isolation and pressure bleed-down of high pressure piping
controls.barrier_role: Eliminate pressure hazard prior to lifting operations

supporting_text: the decision was made not to shut in piping and the 3 affected gas lift wells

Personnel concerns about the decision to make the lift without isolating and bleeding down the high pressure piping was discussed during a pre-job teleconference with management; however, the decision was made not to bleed down
the crew did not use their stop work authority as the incident developed

controls.name: Stop work authority enforcement
controls.barrier_role: Halt unsafe operations when hazards are identified

supporting_text: the crew did not use their stop work authority as the incident developed
the platform Offshore Installation Manager (OIM), performing a platform walk through, observed the operation and then promptly 'Stopped the Job'
Stop Work authority was not used as the incident developed

controls.name: Job Safety Analysis (JSA) prior to critical lifts
controls.barrier_role: Identify hazards and plan safe work procedures
controls.lod_basis: Planning control to prevent unsafe work

supporting_text: A safety stand down was called and then a Job Safety Analysis (JSA) was developed for a plan of action
Prior to the start of the East and West Mezzanine Deck installations, it was reported that there was a Hazard Incident Review Analysis (HIRA) Meeting with management to review and discuss procedures

controls.name: Hazard Incident Review Analysis (HIRA) meeting
controls.barrier_role: Review procedures and identify hazards prior to work

supporting_text: Prior to the start of the East and West Mezzanine Deck installations, it was reported that there was a Hazard Incident Review Analysis (HIRA) Meeting with management to review and discuss procedures and the concerns of whether to shut in or not shut in the high pressure gas piping
the decision was made not to shut in piping and the 3 affected gas lift wells

controls.name: Third party risk assessment for lifting operations
controls.barrier_role: Identify hazards of lifting over high pressure equipment

supporting_text: 3rd Party Risk Assessment Analysis performed prior to the mezzanine decks installation did not adequately identify the hazards of making the lift over high pressure gas piping

notes.rules: JSON output only. mentioned fields must be evidence-based. Use null for unknown values.
